out_of_scope_note: Applied audience-psychology / affective-computing study using wrist PPG to derive between-subject HRV synchrony as a marker of engaging movie segments, validated by self-reported engagement in follow-up cohorts. No neural recording, no circuit- or computation-level model of perception, decision, or encoding; the paper proposes HRV synchrony as a practical authoring tool for trailer editing. Falls under the 'social/HCI study without neural data or computational model of cognition' OOS category.
